semantic.role: Test suite for the runWithRuntimeSession helper, validating checkpoint lifecycle, error handling, and lock management behavior.
responsibilities: Verify runWithRuntimeSession emits a warning when checkpoint loading encounters issues.
Validate that runWithRuntimeSession fails the checkpoint on execution errors and propagates the exception.
Confirm that runWithRuntimeSession always releases the acquired lock regardless of execution outcome.
outOfScope: Unit tests for individual repository or service layers.
Integration or end-to-end (e2e) test coverage across multiple modules.
Performance, security, or concurrency load testing.
Tests for other runtime-session exports beyond runWithRuntimeSession.
invariants: The test file uses the vitest testing framework and follows its conventions (describe/it, beforeEach for mock cleanup).
Every test case calls vi.fn() and vi.doMock() to isolate the module under test from real dependencies (writer-boundary, spine-gate).
The test fixture resets all mocks and modules before each test via vi.resetModules() and vi.restoreAllMocks().
Test file suffix is .test.ts, conforming to the test-file-suffix architectural rule.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain a focused, isolated test suite that validates the runtime session's checkpoint and lock lifecycle contract.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent commit intent provided for this specific test file.
